name: chase-email-after-silence
anchor: Layer 3 #6 (broker silent — timing threshold for escalation)
rationale: Initial broker intake with incomplete documents (missing NOA). Vienna asks for the missing doc. Broker goes silent — no follow-up for N days. F4.CH chase email generator must fire after threshold timing; chase email content is broker-facing minimal-ask shape. Layer 3 item — TIMING THRESHOLD is product-design decision; once decided, F4.CH content shape can be Layer 2 asserted.
notes: Single-event sequence at fixture level. Phase 5 replay harness drives chase-cron forward with synthetic timestamps to trigger F4.CH after broker silence. Layer 3 timing threshold = pending_product_decision in Phase 4.
